rulings.Case Title: VIROLOGIC, INC., A DELAWARE CORP. VS. DOES 1 TO 10
rulings.Calendar Matter: For Limited Discovery Pursuant To Ccp428.16g
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR LIMITED DISCOVERY AS TO BILLYYOUNGWONT GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT SUCH DISCOVERY BE CONDUCTED PURSUANT TO A PROTECTIVE ORDER LIMITING THE DISCLOSURE OF ALL INFORMATION OBTAINED IN DISCOVERY TO TRIAL COUNSEL FOR VIROLOGIC ONLY. AFTER DISCOVERY COMPLETED COURT MAY OR MAY NOT ORDER DISCOVERY REVEALED TO VIROLOGIC. MOTION FOR DISCOVERY OTHERWISE DENIED. (JH)
